allow: Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/Row\\\(children: const \\[\\n\(\\s+\)Icon\\\(Icons\\.check_circle_rounded, color: AppColors\\.success, size: 22\\\),\\n\\s+SizedBox\\\(width: 8\\\),/Row\(children: [\\n${1}const Icon\(Icons.check_circle_rounded, color: AppColors.success, size: 22\),\\n${1}const SizedBox\(width: 8\),/' lib/web/pages/web_scanner_page.dart)

Bash(perl -pi -e 's/CircularProgressIndicator\\\(color: WebTheme\\.text, strokeWidth: 2\\\)/CircularProgressIndicator\(color: Colors.white, strokeWidth: 2\)/g' lib/web/pages/web_create_event_page.dart lib/web/pages/web_settings_page.dart lib/web/web_login_page.dart lib/web/web_register_page.dart lib/web/pages/web_sponsor_event_page.dart)
Bash(perl -pi -e 's/active \\? WebTheme\\.text : AppColors\\.grey/active ? WebTheme.onGradient : AppColors.grey/g; s/Color\\\(0x18FFFFFF\\\)/WebTheme.border/g' lib/web/widgets/web_sidebar.dart)

Bash(perl -pi -e 's/style: TextStyle\\\(color: WebTheme\\.text\\.withOpacity\\\(0\\.85\\\), fontSize: 15\\\)\\\)/style: TextStyle\(color: WebTheme.onGradient.withOpacity\(0.85\), fontSize: 15\)\)/; s/color: WebTheme\\.text\\.withOpacity\\\(0\\.12\\\)/color: WebTheme.onGradient.withOpacity\(0.12\)/; s/child: Icon\\\(Icons\\.insights_rounded, color: WebTheme\\.text, size: 44\\\)/child: Icon\(Icons.insights_rounded, color: WebTheme.onGradient, size: 44\)/' lib/web/pages/web_dashboard_page.dart)
Bash(perl -0pi -e "s/\\? 'مطلوب' : null/? 'field_required'.tr : null/g; s/'الشروط والأحكام',/'register_terms'.tr,/; s/'تسجيل الدخول',/'login_title'.tr,/;" lib/view/screen/auth/register_view.dart)
